finding: PG client resource leak: initPg creates Pool that is never closed. Fixed in revision 5 with try/finally and duck-type check on $client.end().
Dead MIGRATIONS_PG constant removed. MIGRATIONS_SQLITE retained since sqliteMigrate needs explicit migrationsFolder arg.
All 6 changes belong cleanly to migration runner scope. No scope leaks.
All changes additive; new files can be deleted independently; CI job is a new appended job.
Edge cases documented. PG resource cleanup now handled. Missing timeout for remote PG noted as acceptable since drizzle's migrate() has internal timeouts.
